name: Bubble Bread from Captiva,fl
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread diagonally into 3-inch slices.
2. Arrange the slices on a baking sheet.
3. Lightly toast the bread on both sides under a pre-heated broiler.
4. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter.
5. Mince garlic and prosciutto; add to the butter mixture.
6. Beat in half of the freshly grated Parmesan and freshly ground pepper.
7. Spread each slice with cream cheese.
8. Spread the garlic mixture on top.
9. Sprinkle the remaining cheese over the slices.
10. Just before serving, broil or bake at 400°F until hot and bubbling.
